hero.heading: Dedicated to Safe, Supportive Recovery
hero.subheading: Committed to providing private, one-on-one recovery support with professionalism, discretion, and clinical integrity.

elevated_recovery.title: Elevated Recovery, Thoughtfully Delivered
elevated_recovery.description:
Aesthetic Aftercare is a Los Angeles based, RN led post operative recovery service designed specifically for aesthetic and plastic surgery patients.

We provide private, one on one nursing support in the comfort of your home or hotel, always in accordance with your surgeon’s written post operative instructions.
Our role is simple:
To support recovery with clinical attentiveness and discretion.
elevated_recovery.highlight_text: We proudly serve Los Angeles, Beverly Hills, and surrounding Southern California areas, bringing refined, private nursing care wherever recovery takes place.

what_we_do.title: What We Do
what_we_do.subtitle:
We bridge the space between surgical discharge and true recovery.

From RN coordinated pickup to overnight monitoring, our care is delivered with precision, privacy, and quiet attention to detail.

services.title: Delivered strictly within RN scope of practice
Based entirely on surgeon directed instructions
Designed for private home or hotel recovery

left.description:
Aesthetic Aftercare was created to provide private, RN led recovery support delivered with discretion, intention, and quiet attention to detail.

Because refinement should not end in the operating room.

right.description:
Diana and Kristina met in nursing school and later worked together in the Emergency Department, where precision and composure were part of everyday care.
Through years of clinical experience, they came to understand how critical the recovery period is, especially in aesthetic and plastic surgery.

standards.text: In a city where aesthetic excellence is expected, recovery should reflect the same standard.

consultation.title: Begin Your Personalized Recovery Consultation
consultation.subtitle: Share a few details and our Registered Nursing team will thoughtfully review your needs and coordinate a private consultation designed around your safety, comfort, and recovery goals.
consultation.button_text: (Kindly avoid sharing sensitive medical details here. Full health information will be collected securely after consultation confirmation.)
